title: All in One Multi Purpose Multi Fix Use Assorted Size Wall Plugs Heavy Duty Raw Rawl Plug Fixings Brick Stone Cement Concrete Hollow Cavity Partition Partitioning Drywall Professional Hanging Clamps Screw Fixing in Different Sizes  Pack of 52
features: All in One Multi Size Plugs; Top quality wall plugs by PlasPlugs; the best brand for wall plugs
Assorted Sizes in a pack of 52 plugs; complete set of plugs for all types of fixing needs
Superior grip with expanding nylon barrel, anti-rotate ribs for strongest hold
Barbed jaws ensures a tight grip on wall while tightened screw gives tough bite
Each pack comes with usage instructions, recommended screw and drill bit size etc.
description: Plasplugs makes amazing quality wall plugs that can be used for fixing/hanging almost anything imaginable. These packs comes with clear instruction on what sized drill bits to use and what size screws to use. This takes away any guess work that might lead to unnecessary drilling or a damaged wall. Use these plugs to fix/hang anything easily.
